name: agent-booster-pack-skills
description: General Agent Booster Pack skills for Pi: collaborative routing, data, security, debugging, refactoring, and more. Runtime-owned skills ship with their matching extension packages. Renamed from pi-agent-booster-pack; old name deprecated.

scripts.install-ext: npm run build && mkdir -p ~/.pi/agent/extensions && ln -sfn "$(pwd)" ~/.pi/agent/extensions/agent-booster-pack-skills && echo 'Installed to ~/.pi/agent/extensions/agent-booster-pack-skills -- run /reload in Pi to activate'

author: Alastair Dawson
